tasks.build: deno task typecheck && deno run -A npm:vite build
tasks.deploy: rm -rf docs && deno task build && git add docs/ && git commit && git push origin main
tasks.minify:bookmarklet: deno run -A npm:terser kotodama/bookmarklet.js -c -m --toplevel | (printf 'javascript:'; cat) > kotodama/bookmarklet.min.js
